name: historical_notes
Thames Crossing: Compressed Thames crossing: Caesar forces Cassivellaunus' defended ford against bank obstacles and stakes hidden in the riverbed while Briton warriors guard the north bank.

name: ROMAN
column4: force the ford with a tight shielded advance and clear the north bank
column5: open the crossing before the Britons can collapse onto the ford

name: BRITON
column4: hold the bank and stake line while mobile bands strike the Roman flanks
column5: bleed the crossing until Caesar abandons the ford
